value.stringValue: Flow Error - Pre Screener - Tesco Festive Campaign

fields.name: Submitted
fields.fieldText:
Submitted!


Your details have been submitted to our team who are looking forward to learning even more about you.


An email link to our online registration is on it’s way to your inbox so you have the link whenever you need it.


Want to start your registration now? Why wait? Click sign up below to create your account…


{!Sign_Up_Image}

fields.name: Title
fields.fieldText:
Contact Details


Thanks for telling us more about yourself! You’re on your way to becoming part of the team and we can’t wait to meet you.

 

The next step is to get fully registered, please enter you details below to receive an email link to our online registration portal where you can continue your online application and on competition book yourself in for a brief interview.

fields.name: First_Name
fields.fieldText: First Name

fields.name: Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last Name

fields.name: Sorry_Text
fields.fieldText:
Sorry


Thank you for your interest, however this role doesn’t seem like the right fit for your next career move.


﻿Click the button below to see a selection of our other roles that may be of interest to you.

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Oops...looks like something is not working quite right.


Details have been sent to system admin. In the meanwhile, try submitting this page again but make sure you enter valid email and phone number.

fields.name: Invalid_Email_Error_Screen_2
fields.fieldText: The email you entered is invalid. Please use a valid email.

fields.name: Questions
fields.fieldText: Please answer the following questions:

fields.name: Q2
fields.fieldText: Do you have the right to work in the UK (a valid UK passport and /or a valid visa)?

fields.name: Q3
fields.fieldText: Do you have a phone able to download App based technology?

fields.name: Q4
fields.fieldText: Can you commit to working shifts from 28th November through to and including Christmas and New Year’s week?

fields.name: Q9
fields.fieldText: Are you able to work a 9-hour shift?

fields.name: Q4A
fields.fieldText: Can you commit to working shifts from 18th December including Christmas Eve and New Year’s Eve?

fields.name: Q4B
fields.fieldText: Can you commit to working shifts up to and including Christmas and New Year’s weeks?

fields.name: Q5
fields.fieldText: Do you have a high attention to detail?

fields.name: Q5A
fields.fieldText: Are you happy to work outside throughout November and December?

fields.name: Q6
fields.fieldText: Are you comfortable working in a routine and fast paced Retail environment?

fields.name: Q6A
fields.fieldText: Are you able to supervise a small team and liaise with members of management teams?

fields.name: Q6B
fields.fieldText: Are you able to remain calm in high pressurised situations?

fields.name: Q6C
fields.fieldText: Are you able to work independently fulfilling expected allocated work?

fields.name: Q7
fields.fieldText: Do you have Customer Service Experience?

fields.name: Q7A
fields.fieldText: Do you put the customers need first?

fields.name: Q8
fields.fieldText: Are you over the age of 18?

value.stringValue: Which of the roles are you interested in?
Which of the location are you interested to work in?

fields.name: Welcome_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Let’s do Christmas together!


We’re hiring Self Replenishers, Team Leaders, Car Park Marshals and F&F Merchandisers for Tesco over the Festive period. So, if you are passionate about delivering great customer service with a smile and enjoy working in a fun environment, then we would love to hear from you.

textTemplates.name: Details_FF_Merchandisers
textTemplates.text:
Which of the roles are you interested in?

{!Q1_Question.topValue}


Which location are you interested to work in?

{!Q1_Question.middleValue}


Do you have the right to work in the UK (a valid UK passport and /or a valid visa)?

{!Q2}         


Do you have a phone able to download App based technology? 

{!Q3} 


Can you commit to working shifts from 1st November up to and including Christmas and New Year’s weeks?

{!Q4B} 


Do you have a high attention to detail?

{!Q5} 


Are you able to work independently fulfilling expected allocated work?

{!Q6C} 


Do have Customer Service Experience?

{!Q7}

textTemplates.name: Details_Shelf_Replenisher
textTemplates.text:
Which of the roles are you interested in?

{!Q1_Question.topValue}


Which location are you interested to work in?

{!Q1_Question.middleValue}


Do you have the right to work in the UK (a valid UK passport and /or a valid visa)?

{!Q2}         


Do you have a phone able to download App based technology? 

{!Q3} 


Can you commit to working shifts from 28th November through to and including Christmas and New Year’s week?

{!Q4} 


Are you able to work a 9-hour shift?

{!Q9}


Do you have a high attention to detail?

{!Q5} 


 Are you comfortable working in a routine and fast paced Retail environment?

{!Q6} 


Do have Customer Service Experience?

{!Q7} 


 Are you over the age of 18?

{!Q8}

textTemplates.name: Details_Team_Leader
textTemplates.text:
Which of the roles are you interested in?

{!Q1_Question.topValue}


Which location are you interested to work in?

{!Q1_Question.middleValue}


Do you have the right to work in the UK (a valid UK passport and /or a valid visa)?

{!Q2}         


Do you have a phone able to download App based technology? 

{!Q3} 


Can you commit to working shifts from 28th November through to and including Christmas and New Year’s week?

{!Q4} 


Do you have a high attention to detail?

{!Q5} 


Are you able to supervise a small team and liaise with members of management teams?

{!Q6A} 


Do have Customer Service Experience?

{!Q7} 


 Are you over the age of 18?

{!Q8}

textTemplates.name: Details_Traffic_Marshalls
textTemplates.text:
Which of the roles are you interested in?

{!Q1_Question.topValue}


Which location are you interested to work in?

{!Q1_Question.middleValue}


Do you have the right to work in the UK (a valid UK passport and /or a valid visa)?

{!Q2}         


Do you have a phone able to download App based technology? 

{!Q3} 


Can you commit to working shifts from 18th December including Christmas and New Year’s Eve?

{!Q4A} 


Are you happy to work outside throughout November and December?

{!Q5A} 


Are you able to remain calm in high pressurised situations?

{!Q6B} 


Do you put the customers need first?

{!Q7A}

textTemplates.name: Error_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Flow Error Message: 
{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

Run Time: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Candidate Email:   {!Email.value}
Candidate Phone:   {!Mobile.value}
